{{Item
| name = 
| image = Egg sandwich.png
| id = egg_sandwich
| type = Food
| stackable = 64
| Description = Delicious Tamago Sando! Legoshi and Legom approved.
}}

'''Egg Sandwich''' is a delicious food item that fills up 3 hunger points and gives you Regeneration II for 3 seconds.

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Bread <br>+ Egg
|[[File:Egg sandwich crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}
== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
== Trivia ==
[[File:Mashxp's Egg Sandwich.png|thumb|263x263px|''Real-life replica of Egg Sandwich made at Dashie's home'']]

* It was added in DTN 1.12.0.

* This item is a direct reference to '''Legoshi''''s favorite food - from '''Beastars'''.
* According to DashieDev, the item used '''[https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cooked_Chicken Cooked Chicken]''''s code as the base. <s>sorry Legom</s>

[https://media.tenor.com/0vF7P1lNTFwAAAAd/beastars-egg-sandwich.gif ''- Legoshi eating Egg Sandwich -''] <ref>SS 1 Ep 7: Below the Fur Coat - 01:04.</ref>

<references />
